ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the book */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the book belongs to */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the book is currently active and available for borrowing */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the book */,
  "cover_image" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowings" (
  "borrowing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrowing event */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being borrowed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user borrowing the book */,
  "borrow_date" TEXT /* Date the book was borrowed */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the book was returned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the book is due to be returned */,
  "fine" TEXT /* Fine amount if the book is returned late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrowing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_editions" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edition */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book the edition belongs to */,
  "edition_name" TEXT /* Name of the edition */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the edition was published */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the edition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_editions_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book the translation belongs to */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language the book was translated into */,
  "translator" TEXT /* Name of the translator */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the translation was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_translations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_books" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)
